vocab.meaning: trụ cột tài chính trong gia đình
vocab.example: As the sole breadwinner of my family, I take my professional responsibilities very seriously.

vocab.meaning: tình trạng bị cảnh cáo học tập (do kết quả kém)
vocab.example: The course is quite rigorous, and one must stay focused to avoid falling into academic probation.

vocab.meaning: thiên hướng/nghề nghiệp mang tính sứ mệnh
vocab.example: I don't just see my job as a way to pay the bills; I truly feel that nursing is my vocation.

vocab.meaning: kỳ nghỉ phép dài hạn (để nghiên cứu hoặc nghỉ ngơi)
vocab.example: I’m currently on a sabbatical from my teaching position to finish writing my first book.
I am currently enrolled in a distance learning program, which allows me to balance my studies with my part-time job.

vocab.meaning: sự hài lòng với công việc
vocab.example: High levels of job satisfaction are more important to me than a high salary at this stage of my life.

vocab.meaning: giáo dục bậc cao (đại học/cao đẳng)
vocab.example: I am currently pursuing my tertiary education at a leading university in the city.

vocab.meaning: môi trường làm việc nhịp độ nhanh/áp lực
vocab.example: Working in a fast-paced environment like a marketing agency keeps me on my toes every day.

vocab.meaning: sự độc lập về tài chính
vocab.example: The main reason I decided to work while studying was to achieve a sense of financial independence.

vocab.meaning: kinh nghiệm thực hành thực tế
vocab.example: My current internship provides me with the hands-on experience that textbooks simply cannot offer.
